the weeknd: Your entire emotional spectrum is just different shades of a red neon light in an empty club.
lana del rey: You would endure a 5-year toxic situationship just for the aesthetic of crying outside a 7-Eleven.
taylor swift: You treat minor inconveniences in your dating life like they're carefully planned Easter eggs for a massive betrayal.
olivia rodrigo: You got cut off in traffic once and wrote 12 tracks of unbridled, petty vengeance.
frank ocean: You promise you'll text them back 'soon', and then completely disappear for four to six business years.
sza: You'll compose a beautiful R&B ballad about how much you hate them while actively driving to their house.
phoebe bridgers: You show up to the date in a skeleton onesie and start trauma dumping before the appetizers arrive.
radiohead: You think you're an existential intellectual, but you're really just a CS major who refuses to use deodorant.
bon iver: You cried in a porta-potty and called it a 'raw, spiritual acoustic experience.'
mitski: You'll apologize to a chair if you bump into it, but casually ruin your partner's life without blinking.
drake: You reply 'who's this?' when your ex texts you, even though you have their number memorized.
juice wrld: You think heartbreak is a competitive e-sport and you're sweating for the gold medal.
billie eilish: You whisper 'I'm fine' like you're recording a Grammy-winning vocal take from beneath a weighted blanket.
arctic monkeys: You bought a leather jacket entirely to compensate for your profound inability to communicate.
mac demarco: You'll ghost someone and then invite them to 'just hang' on the Arts Quad.
cigarettes after sex: Your entire personality is dim lighting and poor communication.
daniel caesar: You're composing a breakup monologue in your head while still on the first date.
clairo: You caught feelings in a Mann Library study room and never recovered.
joji: You post 'I'm fine' on your story at 3am. You are not fine.
tyler, the creator: You fell in love with someone emotionally unavailable and thought 'I can fix them.'
ethel cain: You describe your love life as 'Southern Gothic' even though you're from Long Island.
lizzy mcalpine: You cried to 'ceilings' in a Collegetown apartment and genuinely concerned your roommate.
gracie abrams: You write 'I miss you' texts you never send and consider it growth.
boygenius: You're not looking for a relationship, you're looking for someone to process your childhood with.
tv girl: You romanticize people you've spoken to exactly once in a discussion section.
men i trust: You describe the situationship as 'chill' while sobbing into your pillow.
beach house: You dissociate at parties and call it 'being present.'
the smiths: You've been single since before Morrissey was problematic, which is saying something.
tame impala: You say 'let it happen' about relationships but mean 'I refuse to communicate.'
steve lacy: You flirt with everyone at the function and leave alone on purpose.
deftones: You want to hold someone's hand but also, like, in a vaguely threatening way.
the national: You're 30 emotionally but 20 chronologically and it shows.
lorde: You turned getting left on read into a full theatrical production.
weyes blood: You'll take someone stargazing and somehow make it about your ex.
bad bunny: You're either the life of the party or crying in the bathroom. No in between.
fiona apple: You'll slam a door, write a poem about it, and somehow THEY have to apologize.
alex g: You think being hard to understand makes you deep. It does not.
dominic fike: You have commitment issues but great taste in guitar tones.
kanye west: You use Auto-Tune on your 3am voice memos and genuinely call it 'performance art.'
ye: You use Auto-Tune on your 3am voice memos and genuinely call it 'performance art.'
kendrick lamar: You explain the conceptual depth of 'To Pimp A Butterfly' when your date asks you what your favorite color is.
playboi carti: You lie for absolutely no reason and communicate strictly in dropped plans and unreadable hieroglyphics.
harry styles: You expect everyone to 'treat people with kindness' while habitually ghosting your closest friends.
noah kahan: You made the winter blues and New England your entire personality.
charli xcx: You're either speeding on the highway or crying in the club. Brat summer never ends.
brent faiyaz: You proudly proclaim yourself 'toxic' and actually think it's a flex.
sabrina carpenter: You write unhinged captions about your ex but insist 'it's just for the bit.'
halsey: You're mentally stuck in 2014 Tumblr, reblogging faded grunge aesthetics.
zach bryan: You bought a Carhartt jacket last week and now pretend to be a tortured cowboy.
chappell roan: You learned therapy speak on TikTok and use it to dodge accountability.
tate mcrae: You think choreographing a dance in your bedroom counts as processing your emotions.
travis scott: You care more about your sneaker rotation than your partner's emotional needs.
kali uchis: You demand princess treatment but offer absolute chaos in return.
jay chou: You think mumbling your feelings over a classical piano piece makes you deep, but you really just need a therapist and less bubble tea.
radwimps: You think shouting your feelings in the rain will solve your communication issues.
yoasobi: You cope with everyday stress by listening to extremely upbeat bops.
kenshi yonezu: You refuse to make eye contact but will gladly drop a 10-page lore dump.
jj lin: You'll hit a flawless high note crying about a middle school rejection, then immediately queue up for another ranked gaming session.
eason chan: You aggressively sob into the karaoke mic singing 'Ten Years' while making everyone else in the room extremely uncomfortable.
mayday: You aggressively insist 'we're still young' while actively complaining about your lower back pain at standard social gatherings.
enhypen: Your standards for romance were severely warped by dark vampire lore.
newjeans: You think manufactured nostalgia for the Y2K era makes you mysterious.
ado: You'll record a flawless 5-octave scream of pure unadulterated rage in your literal closet, but are too shy to ask the barista for oat milk.
faye wong: Your emotional detachment is an aesthetic choice and you refuse to explain yourself.
jpegmafia: You think being permanently online and angry is a substitute for a personality.
mf doom: You explain rhyme schemes to people who just wanted to enjoy the function.
earl sweatshirt: You stare at the floor during conversations and consider it deep contemplation.
100 gecs: Your attention span is exactly 45 seconds and you communicate strictly in sound effects.
sophie: Your aesthetics are flawless but your emotional availability is completely non-existent.
rosalia: You call yourself a 'motomami' but get nervous merging on the highway.
rauw alejandro: You text 'te extraño' to three different people at the exact same time.
peso pluma: You act incredibly tough in public until you get a slight paper cut.
stray kids: You expect your partner to have main character energy but treat them like a background NPC in your noise-music MV.
twice: You're relentlessly 'cheer up' positive to mask the fact you're one minor inconvenience away from snapping.
bts: You expect a beautifully choreographed 12-episode enemies-to-lovers arc, but you can't even maintain a Snapchat streak.
blackpink: You wear designer sunglasses indoors and act completely unbothered while secretly stressing over an unread read-receipt.
big thief: You want to move to a cabin in the woods to fall in love, but you literally don't know how to start a fire.
alvvays: You're still romanticizing a fleeting glance someone gave you on the subway three years ago.
my chemical romance: It wasn't a phase, it's a permanent inability to process joy.
paramore: You're still mad at your high school ex and use it to justify your current toxic traits.
pierce the veil: You substitute actual communication with screaming lyrics in your car.
thundercat: You own an expensive bass guitar that you don't know how to play.
erykah badu: You burn sage instead of facing your problems.
hiatus kaiyote: You use words like 'polyrhythmic' to avoid talking about your actual feelings.
ariana grande: You've said 'thank u, next' 7 times to the same person. You are not next. You went back.
beabadoobee: You're giving indie soft launch but you're literally obsessed with them.
charlie puth: You noticed them noticing you and wrote a whole storyline in your head. They were looking at the menu.
lngshot: You're hyped in the group chat but crying in the uber home.
zara larsson: Spring break is almost over and you have nothing to show for it except a sunburn and this playlist.
